---
name: Learner Pain Point
about: Capture a new IELTS learning difficulty discovered during practice
title: "[Pain Point] "
labels: learner-insight, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Skill Area

- [ ] Reading
- [ ] Listening
- [ ] Vocabulary
- [ ] Speaking
- [ ] Writing
- [ ] Diagnostic Engine
- [ ] Notion Integration

## What Happened?

Describe the practice situation.

## Example

Paste the learner's answer, sentence, question, or mistake.

## What I Think Went Wrong

Example:

- over-inference
- tense drift
- map route lost
- vocabulary forgotten
- sentence too spoken-style

## Desired Agent Behavior

What should the agent detect or do next time?

## Data To Track

Example:

- error type
- confidence
- time taken
- wrong answer
- review date

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Agent can detect or ask about this pattern.
- [ ] Agent labels the likely method.
- [ ] Agent gives a correction rule.
- [ ] Agent recommends a targeted drill.
- [ ] Relevant mistake is saved to Notion if needed.
